changes.description: Added boundary_divergence computation to deriveStructuralEnrichment() — cross-boundary import ratio analysis, orphaned module detection, system divergence index.

Added STRUCTURAL_BOUNDARY_DIVERGENCE to CONDITION_VOCABULARY and CONDITION_INTERVENTIONS. Added roleMap entry. Added ruleStructuralBoundaryDivergence() function. Extended synthesize() and synthesizeTeaser() primitives arrays.
Added mapSBD() function, mapCondition switch case, COGNITION_SLICE_VOCABULARY entry, MAP_CONDITION_KEYS extension.
Added STRUCTURAL_BOUNDARY_DIVERGENCE to CONDITION_NODES. Updated upstream refs on GOV_GAP (defining), COORD_FRAG (conditional), PROP_EXP (conditional). Updated §4 RULE_NODES upstream.
Added STRUCTURAL_BOUNDARY_DIVERGENCE to SECTION_4_RULES and PROJECTION_DISPOSITION_TABLE.
Added STRUCTURAL_BOUNDARY_DIVERGENCE to BOUNDARY_ALIGNMENT surface in SURFACE_CONDITION_MAP.
